title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited:
Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited!
